description: Minimal valid capabilities document. Pins the smallest schema-conformant payload a v0.0.1 registry MUST accept and serve at /.well-known/acdp.json (RFC-ACDP-0007 §3). Implementations MUST accept this document without rejecting unknown-field tolerance settings, closed-enum decoders, or strict additionalProperties handling.

checks: registry_did is a valid DID and (for v0.0.1) is did:web:<authority>
supports_idempotency_key absent → idempotency_key_ttl_seconds need not be present

rationale: This is the floor. Any registry that fails to accept this exact payload is non-conformant. Used as the baseline for caps-002..006 negative cases.
